name: Omelette Pakaki Curry (Spinach & Tomato Omelette)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until the yolks are lemon-colored. Add salt to taste and Garam Masala. Stir well.
2. Heat 1 tablespoon butter or oleo in a skillet. Pour in the egg mixture and cook an omelette about 1/4-inch thick. Cut into small serving pieces. Set aside and keep warm.
3. Salt the spinach and cook in a covered saucepan for 5 minutes until wilted. Grind to a paste.
4. Heat 2 tablespoons butter or oleo in a saucepan. Cook onions, garlic, ginger, and chilies until onions are golden. Add cumin and tomatoes. Cook for a few more minutes.
5. Add 1 cup water and simmer for 10 minutes.
6. Add the omelette pieces and heat through. Stir lightly a few times.
7. Garnish with coriander leaves before serving.
